new_classes.label_en: Rum and other spirits obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products (heading 2208 40)
new_classes.label_de: Rum und anderer Branntwein, gewonnen durch Destillieren vergorener Zuckerrohrerzeugnisse (Position 2208 40)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirits obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products, including rum and tafia, which retain their organoleptic characteristics derived from the sugar-cane raw material.

new_classes.label_en: Rum and other spirits obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products, in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2208 40 51)
new_classes.label_de: Rum und anderer Branntwein aus vergorenen Zuckerrohrerzeugnissen, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 Litern oder weniger (Unterposition 2208 40 51)
new_classes.definition_en: Rum and other spirits obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products, including rum and tafia retaining their organoleptic characteristics, presented in containers of a capacity not exceeding 2 litres.

new_classes.label_en: Sugar-cane fermentation and distillation process (production of rum and tafia)
new_classes.label_de: Fermentations- und Destillationsprozess aus Zuckerrohrerzeugnissen (Herstellung von Rum und Tafia)
new_classes.definition_en: Process of fermenting sugar-cane products (molasses, cane juice, etc.) and subsequently distilling the fermented liquid to produce rum, tafia, and related spirits that retain organoleptic characteristics of the raw material.

new_classes.label_en: Sugar-cane origin quality (spirit derived from fermented sugar-cane products, retaining organoleptic characteristics)
new_classes.label_de: Herkunftsqualität Zuckerrohr (aus vergorenen Zuckerrohrerzeugnissen gewonnener Branntwein mit erhaltenen organoleptischen Eigenschaften)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a spirit indicating that it was produced exclusively from fermented sugar-cane products and retains the organoleptic characteristics derived from that raw material, as required by the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 40 51: (1) production by distillation of fermented sugar-cane products (via SugarCaneFermentationDistillationProcess), (2) retention of organoleptic characteristics of the raw material (via SugarCaneOriginQuality), and (3) container size ≤ 2 L (via SmallContainer part restriction). The explicit mention of 'rum and tafia' as exemplary products from the HS Explanatory Note is covered by the class definition text but cannot be fully formalised as a disjoint named subtype without further legal notes distinguishing rum from tafia within this subheading. The container threshold used here (≤ 2 L) is inferred from the CN sibling structure (22084051 vs 22084091 for > 2 L) but is not explicitly stated in the provided legal note text, which covers the range 22084011–22084099 collectively. No specific TARIC regulatory individuals (measure types, footnotes) were present in the running TBox context for this node, so no such restrictions are added.
